title: cochlearia heterophylla
intro: Cochlearia heterophylla, also known as the Marsh Rocket or Western Rock-cress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of the plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Cochlearia heterophylla include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or added to salads, while the roots can be used to make a tincture.
